title: englerophytum laurentii var. lundense
intro: Englerophytum laurentii var. lundense, also known as the African walnut, is a tree species native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Englerophytum laurentii var. lundense include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as providing antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions or infusions, which can be used to treat various health ailments.
